description: Cinematic multi-drone choreography. Master automated gimbal tracking, dynamic spline trajectories, and integrating ArduPilot parameters with professional film camera rigs (RED/ARRI).
learning_objectives: Understand cinematic techniques: composition, camera movement, lighting, and storytelling through aerial perspectives
Build and train AI models for subject tracking (actors, vehicles), scene understanding, and aesthetic shot evaluation
Create data pipelines for shot logging, metadata management, and integration with post‑production workflows (VFX, color grading)
Deploy optimized models on edge hardware for real‑time tracking, smooth camera gimbal control, and collision avoidance during complex moves
Implement autonomous shot execution: pre‑programmed flight paths, dynamic subject following, multi‑drone coordination
Design safe flight operations on sets with actors, crew, and equipment, including emergency procedures and redundancy
Comply with film industry safety standards (e.g., Section 107, motion picture & television industry guidelines)

modules.title: Cinematic Gimbal Targeting
modules.description: Automate smooth multi-camera tracking curves anticipating dynamic subject movements.
topics: Target framing and predictive Subject Tracking (DeepSORT)
Automated focus pulling via active LiDAR tracking
Real-time video proxy streaming for Director's Monitors

capstone_project.name: Autonomous Cinematography Drone for a Chase Scene
capstone_project.description: Build and test a drone system (in HIL or a controlled outdoor area) that autonomously executes a pre‑planned cinematic shot: tracking a moving vehicle or actor along a 200 m path while maintaining a specific framing (e.g., 3/4 rear view, constant distance). The system must demonstrate smooth motion, subject tracking with < 5 m deviation, and obstacle avoidance (simulated obstacles). Output a video clip with metadata suitable for VFX integration. Achieve tracking success > 90% and motion smoothness (jerk) below a threshold.
deliverables: ROS 2 nodes for tracking, path planning, and smooth control
HIL simulation report with tracking accuracy and motion quality metrics
Safety and regulatory compliance plan for on‑set operations

resources.name: Unreal Engine Virtual Production
resources.description: Integration of drone footage with VFX

glossary.definition: A mathematical curve defined by control points, heavily used in computer graphics and path planning.
